<|11.24|> Christ is always, by the Spirit, united with us.<|14.64|>
<|14.70|> So it's a prayer ultimately, not just for God to come closer.<|18.00|>
<|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.64|> But it's a prayer ultimately about us.<|2.66|>
<|3.40|> That we might become more aware.<|5.40|>
<|6.50|> More conscious, as Dr. Olenov says, of the unconscious.<|10.22|>
<|12.08|> More aware that the Spirit is at home deep within us.<|17.88|>
<|18.88|> The Spirit has made that home.<|20.74|>
<|21.64|> And is our breath each step of our journey.<|25.90|>
<|25.90|> Wherever it may lead.<|27.68|>
